subject: feat(tones): move tone tagging from compose input to post-send bubble hint
body:
Tone selection was cluttering the compose bar. Now messages are sent without
tones, and senders add tones after sending via a "tap to add tones" hint
below their message bubble or through the action sheet. This creates a
simpler send flow and makes tone tagging feel more intentional.

- Remove ToneSelector from ComposeBar (always sends empty tones)
- Add "tap to add tones" hint below own messages (within 15-min window)
- Tapping hint opens ToneEditModal directly
- MessageActionSheet shows "Add Tones" or "Change Tones" dynamically
- ToneEditModal title adapts based on existing tones

Tags: ui, tones, compose, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: tone-tagging
Semver: minor
